content: Disabling self-registration in ASP.NET Core Identity: Since this app uses custom AccountController (not scaffolded Identity UI), self-registration is already in a controller method. Approach: Add [Authorize(Policy='AdminOnly')] to Register GET/POST actions, or remove them entirely and add user creation to AdminController. For group-scoped creation: Admin creates user via AdminController.CreateUser, assigns to current active group via UserGroup junction. No email self-service signup link needed. Existing confirmation email job (ConfirmationEmailJob) reused — admin triggers it manually after creating account. Pattern: Admin fills Name/Email/Password form, system creates user, assigns to group with role, sends confirmation email.
